name: bus_route_metrics
description: Per-route bus metrics: utilization, delays, occupancy. Replaces the old Java-computed table.
querySql: WITH trip_windows AS (SELECT trip_id, MIN(departure_time) AS first_dep, MAX(arrival_time) AS last_arr FROM external_data.bus_stop_times GROUP BY trip_id), active_trips AS (SELECT trip_id FROM trip_windows WHERE (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')::time BETWEEN first_dep AND last_arr), latest_vehicles AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vehicle_id) vehicle_id, trip_id FROM external_data.bus_live_vehicles ORDER BY vehicle_id, timestamp DESC), route_counts AS (SELECT t.route_id, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN at.trip_id IS NOT NULL THEN t.id END) AS scheduled_trips, COUNT(DISTINCT lv.vehicle_id) AS active_vehicles FROM external_data.bus_trips t LEFT JOIN active_trips at ON at.trip_id = t.id LEFT JOIN latest_vehicles lv ON lv.trip_id = t.id GROUP BY t.route_id), route_delays AS (SELECT bt.route_id, AVG(GREATEST(COALESCE(stu.arrival_delay, 0), COALESCE(stu.departure_delay, 0))) AS avg_delay_seconds, MAX(GREATEST(COALESCE(stu.arrival_delay, 0), COALESCE(stu.departure_delay, 0))) AS max_delay_seconds, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN SUM(CASE WHEN stu.arrival_delay > 60 OR stu.departure_delay > 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / COUNT(*) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS late_arrival_pct FROM external_data.bus_live_trip_updates_stop_time_updates stu INNER JOIN external_data.bus_live_trip_updates tu ON stu.trip_update_entry_id = tu.entry_id INNER JOIN external_data.bus_trips bt ON tu.trip_id = bt.id GROUP BY bt.route_id), latest_ridership AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vehicle_id) vehicle_id, passengers_onboard, vehicle_capacity FROM external_data.bus_ridership ORDER BY vehicle_id, timestamp DESC), route_occupancy AS (SELECT t.route_id, AVG(CASE WHEN lr.vehicle_capacity > 0 THEN lr.passengers_onboard::float / lr.vehicle_capacity * 100 END) AS avg_occupancy_pct, MAX(CASE WHEN lr.vehicle_capacity > 0 THEN lr.passengers_onboard::float / lr.vehicle_capacity * 100 END) AS peak_occupancy_pct FROM latest_ridership lr INNER JOIN latest_vehicles lv ON lv.vehicle_id = lr.vehicle_id INNER JOIN external_data.bus_trips t ON t.id = lv.trip_id GROUP BY t.route_id), route_base AS (SELECT r.id AS route_id, r.short_name AS route_short_name, r.long_name AS route_long_name, COALESCE(rc.active_vehicles, 0) AS active_vehicles, COALESCE(rc.scheduled_trips, 0) AS scheduled_trips, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rc.scheduled_trips, 0) > 0 THEN LEAST(rc.active_vehicles::float / rc.scheduled_trips * 100.0, 100.0) ELSE 0.0 END AS utilization_pct, COALESCE(rd.avg_delay_seconds, 0) AS avg_delay_seconds, COALESCE(rd.max_delay_seconds, 0)::int AS max_delay_seconds, COALESCE(ro.avg_occupancy_pct, 0) AS avg_occupancy_pct, COALESCE(ro.peak_occupancy_pct, 0) AS peak_occupancy_pct, COALESCE(rd.late_arrival_pct, 0) AS late_arrival_pct, COALESCE(100.0 - rd.late_arrival_pct, 100.0) AS reliability_pct FROM external_data.bus_routes r LEFT JOIN route_counts rc ON rc.route_id = r.id LEFT JOIN route_delays rd ON rd.route_id = r.id LEFT JOIN route_occupancy ro ON ro.route_id = r.id) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY route_short_name)::bigint AS id, route_id, route_short_name, route_long_name, active_vehicles, scheduled_trips, utilization_pct, avg_delay_seconds, max_delay_seconds, avg_occupancy_pct, peak_occupancy_pct, reliability_pct, late_arrival_pct, CASE WHEN utilization_pct > 90 THEN 'critical' WHEN utilization_pct > 80 THEN 'high' WHEN utilization_pct < 30 THEN 'low' ELSE 'normal' END AS status, NOW() AS computed_at FROM route_base ORDER BY route_short_name
